result.stdout:
Description:
  FGenerator Build Tool

Usage:
  FGenerator.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  build <input>

commands.payload:
Description:
  FGenerator Build Tool

Usage:
  FGenerator.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  build <input>

result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  FGenerator.Cli build <input>... [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input .cs files or glob patterns to process. Supports * (match files) and ** (recursive). e.g., file.cs, **/*.cs

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory (defaults to current directory)
  --unity                Enable Unity .meta file generation (Unity 2022.3.12 or newer)
  --merge                Merge resulting .DLL files into one
  -f, --force            Force overwrite existing files without prompting
  --debug                Build using Debug configuration (defaults to Release)
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  FGenerator.Cli build <input>... [options]

Arguments:
  <input>  Input .cs files or glob patterns to process. Supports * (match files) and ** (recursive). e.g., file.cs, **/*.cs

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory (defaults to current directory)
  --unity                Enable Unity .meta file generation (Unity 2022.3.12 or newer)
  --merge                Merge resulting .DLL files into one
  -f, --force            Force overwrite existing files without prompting
  --debug                Build using Debug configuration (defaults to Release)
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
